title: COVID-19 test validation approved products
text:
Use the coronavirus (COVID-19) test validation approved products document to find out which products have been approved under 
Regulation 38A(5) of the Medical Devices Regulations 2002
.

Read the 
COVID-19 test approval: how to apply
 guidance to find out more about the validation methodology and application process.

Read the 
policy review of the Coronavirus Test Device Approvals (CTDA) process
, published in December 2022.

Products approved under the Medical Devices Coronavirus Test Device Approvals Amendment Regulations

MS Excel Spreadsheet
, 
42.1 KB

This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.

 Request an accessible format.
 

 

 
 If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email 
publications@ukhsa.gov.uk
. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.
description: Find out which COVID-19 test products have been approved.
